mapper.sql: select project_id, project_code, project_name, industry, region, region_id, short_name, established_year, project_category, project_dept, project_status, project_stage, acceptance_status, estimated_workload, actual_workload, adjust_workload, project_address, project_plan, project_description, project_manager_id, market_manager_id, participants, sales_manager_id, sales_contact, team_leader_id, customer_id, customer_contact_id, merchant_contact, merchant_phone, start_date, end_date, production_date, acceptance_date, project_budget, project_cost, expense_budget, cost_budget, labor_cost, purchase_cost, approval_status, approval_reason, approval_time, approver_id, industry_code, region_code, remark, tax_rate, confirm_user_id, confirm_time, reserved_field1, reserved_field2, reserved_field3, reserved_field4, reserved_field5, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, revenue_confirm_status, revenue_confirm_year, revenue_confirm_date, confirm_amount, after_tax_amount, company_revenue_confirmed_by, company_revenue_confirmed_time from pm_project
mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.industry, p.region, p.region_id, p.short_name, p.established_year, p.project_category, p.project_dept, p.project_status, p.project_stage, p.acceptance_status, p.estimated_workload, ROUND(p.actual_workload / 8, 3) + COALESCE(p.adjust_workload, 0) AS actual_workload, p.adjust_workload, p.project_address, p.project_plan, p.project_description, p.project_manager_id, p.market_manager_id, p.participants, p.sales_manager_id, p.sales_contact, p.team_leader_id, p.customer_id, p.customer_contact_id, p.merchant_contact, p.merchant_phone, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.production_date, p.acceptance_date, p.project_budget, p.project_cost, p.expense_budget, p.cost_budget, p.labor_cost, p.purchase_cost, p.approval_status, p.approval_reason, p.approval_time, p.approver_id, p.industry_code, p.region_code, p.remark, p.tax_rate, p.confirm_user_id, p.confirm_time, p.reserved_field1, p.reserved_field2, p.reserved_field3, p.reserved_field4, p.reserved_field5, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.revenue_confirm_status, p.revenue_confirm_year, p.revenue_confirm_date, p.confirm_amount, p.after_tax_amount, p.company_revenue_confirmed_by, p.company_revenue_confirmed_time, d.dept_name AS dept_name, sr.region_name AS region_name, u1.nick_name AS project_manager_name, u2.nick_name AS market_manager_name, u3.nick_name AS sales_manager_name, cust.customer_simple_name AS customer_name, cc.contact_name AS customer_contact_name, cc.contact_phone AS customer_contact_phone, ca.contract_amount AS contract_amount, ca.contract_status AS contract_status, ca.contract_name AS contract_name, ca.contract_code AS contract_code, p.parent_id, p.project_level, p.task_code, p.batch_id, p.production_year, p.bank_demand_no, p.software_demand_no, p.product, p.internal_closure_date, p.functional_test_date, p.production_version_date, p.schedule_status, p.function_description, p.implementation_plan, p.actual_production_date, p.task_create_by, p.task_create_time, p.task_update_by, p.task_update_time, u_tc.nick_name AS task_create_by_name, u_tu.nick_name AS task_update_by_name, pb.batch_no, pb.plan_production_date, pp2.project_name as parent_project_name FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN pm_project pp2 ON p.parent_id = pp2.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON CAST(p.project_dept AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(d.dept_id AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN pm_secondary_region sr ON p.region_id = sr.region_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON p.project_manager_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON p.market_manager_id = u2.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u3 ON p.sales_manager_id = u3.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u_tc ON p.task_create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u_tc.user_name LEFT JOIN sys_user u_tu ON p.task_update_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u_tu.user_name LEFT JOIN pm_production_batch pb ON p.batch_id = pb.batch_id LEFT JOIN pm_customer cust ON p.customer_id = cust.customer_id LEFT JOIN pm_customer_contact cc ON p.customer_contact_id = cc.contact_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pcr.project_id, SUM(c.contract_amount) AS contract_amount, MAX(c.contract_status) AS contract_status, GROUP_CONCAT(c.contract_name ORDER BY c.contract_id SEPARATOR '\n') AS contract_name, GROUP_CONCAT(c.contract_code ORDER BY c.contract_id SEPARATOR '\n') AS contract_code FROM pm_project_contract_rel pcr JOIN pm_contract c ON pcr.contract_id = c.contract_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE pcr.del_flag = '0' AND pcr.rel_status = '有效' GROUP BY pcr.project_id ) ca ON p.project_id = ca.project_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project
project_code, project_name, industry, region, region_id, short_name, established_year, project_category, project_dept, project_status, project_stage, acceptance_status, estimated_workload, actual_workload, adjust_workload, project_address, project_plan, project_description, project_manager_id, market_manager_id, participants, sales_manager_id, sales_contact, team_leader_id, customer_id, customer_contact_id, merchant_contact, merchant_phone, start_date, end_date, production_date, acceptance_date, project_budget, project_cost, expense_budget, cost_budget, labor_cost, purchase_cost, approval_status, approval_reason, industry_code, region_code, remark, tax_rate, confirm_user_id, confirm_time, reserved_field1, reserved_field2, reserved_field3, reserved_field4, reserved_field5, del_flag, parent_id, project_level, task_code, batch_id, production_year, bank_demand_no, software_demand_no, product, production_version_date, schedule_status, function_description, implementation_plan, actual_production_date, task_create_by, task_create_time, task_update_by, task_update_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, revenue_confirm_status, revenue_confirm_year, revenue_confirm_date, confirm_amount, after_tax_amount, company_revenue_confirmed_by, company_revenue_confirmed_time,
#{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{industry}, #{region}, #{regionId}, #{shortName}, #{establishedYear}, #{projectCategory}, #{projectDept}, #{projectStatus}, #{projectStage}, #{acceptanceStatus}, #{estimatedWorkload}, #{actualWorkload}, #{adjustWorkload}, #{projectAddress}, #{projectPlan}, #{projectDescription}, #{projectManagerId}, #{marketManagerId}, #{participants}, #{salesManagerId}, #{salesContact}, #{teamLeaderId}, #{customerId}, #{customerContactId}, #{merchantContact}, #{merchantPhone}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{productionDate}, #{acceptanceDate}, #{projectBudget}, #{projectCost}, #{expenseBudget}, #{costBudget}, #{laborCost}, #{purchaseCost}, #{approvalStatus}, #{approvalReason}, #{industryCode}, #{regionCode}, #{remark}, #{taxRate}, #{confirmUserId}, #{confirmTime}, #{reservedField1}, #{reservedField2}, #{reservedField3}, #{reservedField4}, #{reservedField5}, #{delFlag}, #{parentId}, #{projectLevel}, #{taskCode}, #{batchId}, #{productionYear}, #{bankDemandNo}, #{softwareDemandNo}, #{product}, #{productionVersionDate}, #{scheduleStatus}, #{functionDescription}, #{implementationPlan}, #{actualProductionDate}, #{taskCreateBy}, #{taskCreateTime}, #{taskUpdateBy}, #{taskUpdateTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{revenueConfirmStatus}, #{revenueConfirmYear}, #{revenueConfirmDate}, #{confirmAmount}, #{afterTaxAmount}, #{companyRevenueConfirmedBy}, #{companyRevenueConfirmedTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from pm_project where project_id in
#{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pm_project WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del_flag = '0' AND project_level = 1

select p.project_id as "projectId", p.project_name as "projectName", p.task_code as "taskCode", p.project_stage as "projectStage", p.project_manager_id as "projectManagerId", u.nick_name as "projectManagerName", p.estimated_workload as "estimatedWorkload", ROUND(p.actual_workload / 8, 3) + COALESCE(p.adjust_workload, 0) as "actualWorkload", pb.batch_no as "batchNo" from pm_project p left join sys_user u on p.project_manager_id = u.user_id left join pm_production_batch pb on p.batch_id = pb.batch_id where p.del_flag = '0' and p.parent_id = #{parentId} and p.project_level = 1 and (p.project_stage is null or p.project_stage != '11') and (p.project_status is null or p.project_status = '0') order by p.task_code, p.create_time

select p.project_id as "projectId", p.task_code as "taskCode", p.project_name as "projectName", p.product as "product", p.estimated_workload as "estimatedWorkload", p.functional_test_date as "functionalTestDate", p.batch_id as "batchId", pb.batch_no as "batchNo", pb.plan_production_date as "planProductionDate", u.nick_name as "projectManagerName" from pm_project p left join sys_user u on p.project_manager_id = u.user_id left join pm_production_batch pb on p.batch_id = pb.batch_id where p.del_flag = '0' and p.parent_id = #{parentId} and p.project_level = 1 order by p.task_code, p.create_time

SELECT COALESCE(MAX( CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(project_code, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED) ), 0) FROM pm_project WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND project_level = 1 AND del_flag = '0' AND project_code REGEXP '-[0-9]{7}$'

select distinct parent_id from pm_project where del_flag = '0' and project_level = 1 and parent_id in
#{id}

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_stage AS projectStage, p.project_dept AS projectDept, p.project_manager_id AS projectManagerId, u_pm.nick_name AS projectManagerName, p.market_manager_id AS marketManagerId, p.project_category AS projectCategory, p.region AS region, p.region_id AS regionId, sr.region_name AS regionName, p.project_budget AS projectBudget, p.estimated_workload AS estimatedWorkload, ROUND(p.actual_workload / 8, 3) + COALESCE(p.adjust_workload, 0) AS actualWorkload, ca.contract_name AS contractName, ca.contract_code AS contractCode, ca.contract_amount AS contractAmount, ca.contract_status AS contractStatus, p.revenue_confirm_year AS revenueConfirmYear, p.revenue_confirm_date AS revenueConfirmDate, p.revenue_confirm_status AS revenueConfirmStatus, p.confirm_amount AS confirmAmount, p.participants AS participants, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.acceptance_date AS acceptanceDate, p.approval_status AS approvalStatus, p.project_status AS projectStatus, p.acceptance_status AS acceptanceStatus, tc.team_confirm_depts AS teamDeptName, tc.team_confirm_amount AS teamConfirmAmount, u_upd.nick_name AS updateByName, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN pm_secondary_region sr ON p.region_id = sr.region_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pcr.project_id, GROUP_CONCAT(c.contract_name ORDER BY c.contract_id SEPARATOR '\n') AS contract_name, GROUP_CONCAT(c.contract_code ORDER BY c.contract_id SEPARATOR '\n') AS contract_code, SUM(c.contract_amount) AS contract_amount, MAX(c.contract_status) AS contract_status FROM pm_project_contract_rel pcr JOIN pm_contract c ON pcr.contract_id = c.contract_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE pcr.del_flag = '0' AND pcr.rel_status = '有效' GROUP BY pcr.project_id ) ca ON p.project_id = ca.project_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.project_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT d.dept_name ORDER BY d.dept_name SEPARATOR '、') AS team_confirm_depts, SUM(t.confirm_amount) AS team_confirm_amount FROM pm_team_revenue_confirmation t JOIN sys_dept d ON t.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE t.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY t.project_id ) tc ON p.project_id = tc.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u_pm ON p.project_manager_id = u_pm.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u_upd ON p.update_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u_upd.user_name
ORDER BY p.update_time DESC

SELECT SUM(COALESCE(tc.team_confirm_amount, 0)) AS teamConfirmAmount, SUM(p.project_budget) AS projectBudget, SUM(p.estimated_workload) AS estimatedWorkload, ROUND(SUM(p.actual_workload) / 8, 3) + COALESCE(SUM(p.adjust_workload), 0) AS actualWorkload, SUM(COALESCE(ca.contract_amount, 0)) AS contractAmount, SUM(COALESCE(p.confirm_amount, 0)) AS confirmAmount FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, SUM(confirm_amount) AS team_confirm_amount FROM pm_team_revenue_confirmation WHERE del_flag = '0' AND dept_id = #{confirmDeptId} GROUP BY project_id ) tc ON p.project_id = tc.project_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pcr.project_id, SUM(c.contract_amount) AS contract_amount, MAX(c.contract_status) AS contract_status FROM pm_project_contract_rel pcr JOIN pm_contract c ON pcr.contract_id = c.contract_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE pcr.del_flag = '0' AND pcr.rel_status = '有效' GROUP BY pcr.project_id ) ca ON p.project_id = ca.project_id
SELECT region_id AS regionId, region_name AS regionName, region_code AS regionCode FROM pm_secondary_region WHERE region_dict_value = #{regionDictValue} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY region_id

SELECT customer_id AS customerId, customer_simple_name AS customerSimpleName, customer_full_name AS customerFullName FROM pm_customer WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND customer_simple_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerSimpleName}, '%')
ORDER BY customer_id

SELECT contact_id AS contactId, contact_name AS contactName, contact_phone AS contactPhone, contact_email AS contactEmail FROM pm_customer_contact WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY contact_id

SELECT d.dept_id AS deptId, d.parent_id AS parentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, d.ancestors, d.order_num AS orderNum FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' ${params.dataScope} ORDER BY d.parent_id, d.order_num

SELECT d.dept_id AS deptId, d.parent_id AS parentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, d.ancestors, d.order_num AS orderNum FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' ORDER BY d.parent_id, d.order_num

SELECT p.project_id, p.project_name, p.project_code, p.project_budget, p.estimated_workload, d.dept_name AS dept_name FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON p.project_dept = d.dept_id WHERE p.del_flag = '0' AND (p.project_level IS NULL OR p.project_level = 0) AND ( p.project_dept = #{deptId} OR p.project_dept IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0 AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0' ) ) AND p.approval_status = '1'
AND p.project_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT rel.project_id FROM pm_project_contract_rel rel WHERE rel.del_flag = '0' AND rel.rel_status = '有效' AND rel.contract_id != #{excludeContractId} )
AND p.project_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT rel.project_id FROM pm_project_contract_rel rel WHERE rel.del_flag = '0' AND rel.rel_status = '有效' )
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.industry, p.region, p.region_id, p.short_name, p.established_year, p.project_category, p.project_dept, p.project_stage, p.acceptance_status, p.estimated_workload, ROUND(p.actual_workload / 8, 3) + COALESCE(p.adjust_workload, 0) AS actual_workload, p.project_address, p.project_plan, p.project_description, p.project_manager_id, p.market_manager_id, p.participants, p.sales_manager_id, p.sales_contact, p.team_leader_id, p.customer_id, p.customer_contact_id, p.merchant_contact, p.merchant_phone, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.production_date, p.acceptance_date, p.project_budget, p.project_cost, p.expense_budget, p.cost_budget, p.labor_cost, p.purchase_cost, p.approval_status, p.approval_reason, p.approval_time, p.approver_id, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, d.dept_name AS dept_name FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON p.project_dept = d.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_project_contract_rel rel ON p.project_id = rel.project_id WHERE rel.contract_id = #{contractId} AND p.del_flag = '0' AND rel.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT project_id as projectId, project_name as projectName, project_code as projectCode FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0' AND (project_level IS NULL OR project_level = 0)
AND (project_dept = #{projectDept} OR project_dept IN (SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{projectDept}, ancestors) > 0))
AND project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT DISTINCT task_code FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0' AND project_level = 1 AND task_code IS NOT NULL
AND task_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{taskCode}, '%')
ORDER BY task_code LIMIT 20

SELECT DISTINCT project_name FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0' AND project_level = 1 AND project_name IS NOT NULL
AND project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
ORDER BY project_name LIMIT 20

select distinct p.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_stage as projectStage, p.create_time as createTime, dict.dict_label as projectStageName, p.estimated_workload as estimatedWorkload, ROUND(p.actual_workload / 8, 3) + COALESCE(p.adjust_workload, 0) as actualWorkload, p.revenue_confirm_year as revenueConfirmYear, u.nick_name as projectManagerName from pm_project p left join sys_dict_data dict on p.project_stage COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = dict.dict_value and dict.dict_type = 'sys_xmjd' left join sys_user u on p.project_manager_id = u.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' where p.del_flag = '0' and (p.project_level is null or p.project_level = 0) and p.approval_status = '1' and p.project_status = '0' and (p.project_stage is null or p.project_stage != '11') and ( p.project_manager_id = #{userId} or p.market_manager_id = #{userId} or p.team_leader_id = #{userId} or FIND_IN_SET(#{userId}, p.participants) or p.project_id in ( select pm.project_id from pm_project_member pm where pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.is_active = '1' and pm.del_flag = '0' ) ) order by p.create_time desc
SELECT dept_id AS deptId, dept_name AS deptName, ancestors FROM sys_dept WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT user_id AS userId, nick_name AS nickName FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: update pm_project set actual_workload = #{actualWorkload}, update_time = now() where project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(actual_workload), 0) from pm_project where parent_id = #{parentId} and project_level = 1 and del_flag = '0'

SELECT project_id AS projectId, project_code AS projectCode, project_name AS projectName FROM pm_project WHERE (project_code = #{codePrefix} OR project_code LIKE CONCAT(#{codePrefix}, '-%'))
AND project_id != #{excludeProjectId}
